text: Strategic initiatives focus on small business support and travel partnership expansion. American Express, founder of Small Business Saturday since 2010, announced a new $5 million Amex Shop Small Grants Program in November 2025, along with a content partnership with creator and small business advocate Keith Lee, and free customized signage for small businesses. Market analysis suggests much of the stock's 23.3% year-to-date rally has been driven by optimism around consumer spending and positive headlines highlighting American Express's strategic partnerships with travel and lifestyle brands. The company participated in the KBW Fintech Payments Conference 2025 on November 12, 2025, indicating active engagement with the investment community on payments strategy.
